title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: WasmCPT handle UAF by import dispatch table corruption (multiple variants of b/446113730)
bounty_rationale: v8 sandbox bypass with controllable write
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

V8 sandbox bypass through WasmCPT handle UAF by corrupting `dispatch_table_for_imports` (either growing or overwriting entries) to drop import wrapper handle at `WasmDispatchTableData`. Entries in the original table are still indirectly reachable through `Was
